check.action: Working tree is dirty. Halt with: "Working tree has uncommitted changes. Stash, commit, or discard before invoking worktree-setup. Output:\n{{git_status_output}}"

substep.title: Determine Base Branch
substep.action: thoughts metadata | grep -E "^base_branch:" | head -1 | cut -d: -f2- | tr -d ' '

check.action:
Surface the wt error to the user verbatim. Common failures: - `wt` not installed (install via `brew install worktrunk`) - shell integration not active (`wt config shell install`) - base branch does not exist (verify with `git branch -a`)
Halt and do not proceed.
Halt with: "wt switch -c reported success but the worktree is not visible in `wt list`. This indicates a worktrunk state inconsistency. Inspect with `wt list` and `git worktree list`."
